name: Rotation Side Book
mandate: Overlooked, de-rated quality that benefits as money rotates out of the crowded AI trade post-war (Baker 'franchise on the other side'). Complement to the AI-supply-chain After Hours book; deliberately low correlation. 6-18mo tactical tilt, not all-in.
selection_filter: (1) trading well below 52w high, de-rated on narrative not fundamentals; (2) quality/franchise with real cash flow; (3) a rotation catalyst (breadth/rates/oil/IPO-wave/M&A); (4) under-followed angle.

current_holdings.thesis: De-rated payroll/HCM franchise (dividend aristocrat) down 30% on AI-disruption fear that the moat doesn't actually break. Infrastructure FOR AI workforce mgmt, not a victim.
SMB payroll, high-margin + dividend, down 34% on the same AI-narrative overshoot.
Higher-growth payroll, deepest de-rate (-48%) = most beta if the narrative reverses; discount partly earned (more automatable).
NYSE + data + mortgage tech franchise on sale (-25%); IPO-cycle + data annuity + rate-thaw optionality.
Listings + index + market-data; direct beneficiary as mega-AI labs (SpaceX done, OpenAI/Anthropic ahead) list on Nasdaq.
Alt-asset manager (-36%); private-market liquidity unlock (AI-lab exits/IPO realizations) flows to fee + carry. Most rate-sensitive name.
Sterilization + endoscopy razor-blade compounder simply on sale (-23%); quality healthcare at a discount.
Managed care, deeply out of favor on MLR fears (-36%) — the contrarian end of the healthcare-laggard trade.
Small-cap surgical devices (-39%), recurring disposables, plausible M&A target in the medtech deal wave.
Lowest-cost/longest-life copper into a structural refined-copper deficit (electrification+grid+AI); cleaner than FCX (at highs).

cash_rationale: Rotations are choppy (June 15 tech +3%, June 16 tech -1.2%). Dry powder to add on head-fakes; this is a tilt not an all-in.

history.note: 10 names across de-rated software, capital-markets/IPO-cycle, contrarian healthcare, copper. 80% invested / 20% cash. Research: wiki/analyses/2026-06-16-rotation-side-portfolio.md
